overview.text: NSW Mines Rescue is a service of Coal Services Pty Ltd (jointly owned by the NSW black-coal industry and the CFMEU). It provides specialist underground rescue capability, mine-emergency response and breathing-apparatus expertise to NSW coal mines and metalliferous operations.

items: Stations at Argenton (Hunter), Singleton, Lithgow, Woonona and Wollongong.
On-call brigade members are also working miners at member sites.
Capabilities: long-duration BA, irrespirable-atmosphere rescue, gas analysis, sealing teams, casualty extraction.
